description: Research dry-run summaries, token funnel, and mock position outcomes.

panels.title: Latest Run PnL

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE("realizedPnlUsd", 0)::numeric AS value FROM "ResearchRun" WHERE COALESCE(id::text, '') ~* '^(${runId:regex})$' AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${runStatus:regex})$' AND "startedAt" >= $__timeFrom() AND "startedAt" <= $__timeTo() ORDER BY "startedAt" DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Latest completed dry-run PnL in the selected research slice.

panels.title: Latest Win Rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE("winRatePercent", 0)::numeric AS value FROM "ResearchRun" WHERE COALESCE(id::text, '') ~* '^(${runId:regex})$' AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${runStatus:regex})$' AND "startedAt" >= $__timeFrom() AND "startedAt" <= $__timeTo() ORDER BY "startedAt" DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Latest dry-run win rate in the selected research slice.

panels.title: Latest Discovered

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE("totalDiscovered", 0) AS value FROM "ResearchRun" WHERE COALESCE(id::text, '') ~* '^(${runId:regex})$' AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${runStatus:regex})$' AND "startedAt" >= $__timeFrom() AND "startedAt" <= $__timeTo() ORDER BY "startedAt" DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Latest dry-run discovery count in the selected scope.

panels.title: Strategy Passed

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE("totalStrategyPassed", 0) AS value FROM "ResearchRun" WHERE COALESCE(id::text, '') ~* '^(${runId:regex})$' AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${runStatus:regex})$' AND "startedAt" >= $__timeFrom() AND "startedAt" <= $__timeTo() ORDER BY "startedAt" DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Latest count of tokens that passed strategy gates.

targets.rawSql: SELECT id, status, "startedAt" AS started_at, "completedAt" AS completed_at, "totalDiscovered" AS total_discovered, "totalStrategyPassed" AS total_strategy_passed, "totalMockOpened" AS total_mock_opened, "totalMockClosed" AS total_mock_closed, "realizedPnlUsd"::numeric AS realized_pnl_usd, "winRatePercent"::numeric AS win_rate_percent, "averageHoldMinutes"::numeric AS average_hold_minutes FROM "ResearchRun" WHERE "startedAt" >= $__timeFrom() AND "startedAt" <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(id::text, '') ~* '^(${runId:regex})$' AND COALESCE(status::text, '') ~* '^(${runStatus:regex})$' ORDER BY "startedAt" DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT rt."runId" AS run_id, rt.mint, rt.symbol, rt.source, rt.shortlisted, rt."fullEvaluationDone" AS full_evaluation_done, rt."strategyPassed" AS strategy_passed, rt."strategyRejectReason" AS strategy_reject_reason, rt."evaluationDeferReason" AS evaluation_defer_reason, rt."liveTradable" AS live_tradable, rt."researchTradable" AS research_tradable, rt."entryScore"::numeric AS entry_score, rt."exitProfile" AS exit_profile FROM "ResearchToken" rt JOIN "ResearchRun" rr ON rr.id = rt."runId" WHERE COALESCE(rt."runId"::text, '') ~* '^(${runId:regex})$' AND COALESCE(rr.status::text, '') ~* '^(${runStatus:regex})$' AND COALESCE(rt.source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' ORDER BY rt."createdAt" DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT rp."runId" AS run_id, rp.id AS position_id, rp.mint, rp.symbol, rp.status, rp."openedAt" AS opened_at, rp."closedAt" AS closed_at, rp."entryPriceUsd"::numeric AS entry_price_usd, rp."currentPriceUsd"::numeric AS current_price_usd, rp."amountUsd"::numeric AS amount_usd, rp."remainingToken"::numeric AS remaining_token, rp."exitReason" AS exit_reason FROM "ResearchPosition" rp JOIN "ResearchRun" rr ON rr.id = rp."runId" WHERE COALESCE(rp."runId"::text, '') ~* '^(${runId:regex})$' AND COALESCE(rr.status::text, '') ~* '^(${runStatus:regex})$' ORDER BY rp."openedAt" DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Research Fill Trail

targets.rawSql: SELECT rf."createdAt" AS created_at, rp."runId" AS run_id, rp.id AS position_id, rp.mint, rp.symbol, rf.side, rf."priceUsd"::numeric AS price_usd, rf."amountUsd"::numeric AS amount_usd, rf."pnlUsd"::numeric AS pnl_usd FROM "ResearchFill" rf JOIN "ResearchPosition" rp ON rp.id = rf."positionId" JOIN "ResearchRun" rr ON rr.id = rp."runId" WHERE COALESCE(rp."runId"::text, '') ~* '^(${runId:regex})$' AND COALESCE(rr.status::text, '') ~* '^(${runStatus:regex})$' ORDER BY rf."createdAt" DESC LIMIT 100

panels.description: Mock execution trail for the selected dry-run slice.

list.definition: SELECT TO_CHAR("startedAt", 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') || ' · ' || status || ' · ' || LEFT(id, 8) AS __text, id AS __value FROM "ResearchRun" ORDER BY "startedAt" DESC
list.label: Research Run
list.name: runId
list.query: SELECT TO_CHAR("startedAt", 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') || ' · ' || status || ' · ' || LEFT(id, 8) AS __text, id AS __value FROM "ResearchRun" ORDER BY "startedAt" DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT status AS __text, status AS __value FROM "ResearchRun" ORDER BY 1
list.label: Run Status
list.name: runStatus
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT status AS __text, status AS __value FROM "ResearchRun" ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT source AS __text, source AS __value FROM "ResearchToken" ORDER BY 1
list.label: Source
list.name: source
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source AS __text, source AS __value FROM "ResearchToken" ORDER BY 1

title: Research & Dry-Run Analysis
